response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of software development experience with strong full-stack credentials, including recent TypeScript/Node.js work at re:cinq and Optilyz, React experience, AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators), and a CS degree. Stack alignment is strong on primary technologies, with demonstrated craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, testing workshops). Gaps include no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, limited Kotlin/Java depth in recent roles, and unclear cloud platform breadth beyond AWS CDK.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple senior roles, exceeding the 6+ year requirement
Direct AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) matching a key requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching/workshop background
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the primary stack
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; Java mentions are from 2014-2018 robotics/tooling work
Cloud breadth unclear — AWS CDK mentioned but no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes production depth detailed

key_factors.factor: Primary stack alignment (TS/Node/React) + AI agent experience
Seniority and breadth (13+ years, staff/senior roles, craftsmanship practices)
